title: Xia De-hong, 94, Dies; Persecuted in China, She Starred in Daughter’s Memoir
summary_full: “Wild Swans,” a best-selling 1991 memoir, told the story of a stoic mother holding her family together amid torture and imprisonment under Mao’s regime.
summary_public: “Wild Swans,” a best-selling 1991 memoir, told the story of a stoic mother holding her family together amid torture and imprisonment under Mao’s regime.
